rationale: Gov't Code §2306.002 is a policy declaration for the Department of Housing and Community Affairs. Increasing the homestead exemption does not conflict with or require amendment to this section.
quote: The highest priority of the department is to provide assistance to individuals and families of low and very low income who are not assisted by private enterprise or other governmental programs so that they may obtain affordable housing or other services and programs offered by the department.
_note: No conflict. Rule is a policy statement, not an operative constraint on Tax Code §11.13(b).
